home.description: Create and manage your characters for D&D 5e, Brancalonia and Apocalisse. Works entirely in your browser, no sign-up required and no data sent to any server.

import.parseError: The file does not contain valid JSON. Make sure it is a .json file exported from this app.
import.notObject: The JSON file does not contain a valid character. It must be an object with character data.
import.unknownError: Unknown error while importing. Please try again.
import.variantMismatch: The imported character is for {actual}, not {expected}. It will be loaded with the correct variant.
import.MISSING_VARIANT: Missing game variant (dnd5e, brancalonia, or apocalisse)
import.INVALID_LEVEL: Level must be a number between 1 and 20
import.INVALID_ABILITY_SCORES: Ability scores must be numbers between 1 and 30
import.INVALID_SKILLPROFICIENCIES: Skill proficiencies must be a list
import.INVALID_FEATURESTRAITS: Features and traits must be a list
import.INVALID_SPELLSKNOWN: Known spells must be a list
import.INVALID_SPELLSPREPARED: Prepared spells must be a list
import.WARN_NO_HP: Hit points have not been calculated

variant.title: Choose Game Variant
variant.dnd5eDesc: The classic edition of Dungeons & Dragons with all SRD classes and races
variant.brancaloniaDesc: Spaghetti Fantasy set in a fantastical medieval Italy. Maximum level 6.
variant.brancaloniaPromo: If you like Brancalonia, buy the manuals on
variant.apocalisseDesc: Post-apocalyptic Dark Fantasy set on the Plain of Armageddon. Uses D&D 5e base classes with 12 unique apocalyptic archetypes.
variant.apocalissePromo: If you like Apocalisse, buy the manuals on
variant.dnd5ePromo: If you like D&D 5e, buy the manuals on

spells.title: Spells
spells.notACaster: Your class does not have spellcasting abilities.

details.title: Character Details
details.name: Character Name
details.sessionNotesPlaceholder: Jot down notes from your sessions, reminders, goals...

review.title: Character Summary
review.shareManual: Copy the link below to share your character:
review.shareFailed: Could not generate share link. Try again.

share.errorDesc: The share link is invalid or corrupted. Please ask for a new link.

characters.storageWarning: Saved characters are stored in your browser's localStorage. They will be deleted if you clear your cache or site data.
characters.backupAdvice: We recommend regularly exporting your characters as JSON files for local backup.
characters.noCharacters: You don't have any saved characters yet.

footer.wsgTitle: This site follows W3C Web Sustainability Guidelines

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.noData: This application does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data to external servers.
privacy.localStorage: All character data is saved exclusively in your browser's local storage (localStorage). No data leaves your device.
privacy.noCookies: We do not use tracking cookies, analytics, or any third-party services.
privacy.noAccount: No account registration is required. The application works entirely offline after the first load.

gdpr.banner: This app works entirely in your browser. No data is sent to any server. We only use a technical cookie to save your language preference.
